rationale.R1.3: The output audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is not explicitly disclosed for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content but has one minor regression (circularity problem).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
